魔法在我面前算个鸟，本人除了会飞还会布阵。炼药师在我面前算个屁，本人除了炼丹还会炼法器。斗气在我面前算根葱，本人直接真气加法器。
美女是用来泡的，管你是祸国还是殃民。对手是用来踩的，管你是枭雄还是霸主。
看岳诚如何在这个斗气和魔法纵横的异世开创出一个修真全能横行的景象，充分发挥出见妞就泡，替天行道的真谛。（本故事穿越纯属虚构）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a0c6dc0647c34cacb9e6ffbfeae0e71f","author":"禹枫","author_id":"","book_id":"6488864900297788430","book_name":"修真者在异世","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383880","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8276人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6498635762232197645","read_count":"8276","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4463240"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"1158","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,异世大陆","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/6eda0002efff0753190f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383464&x-signature=sVAixoo1cGnd6GlejLqBuiqJGM0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7971,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7971,"reply_count":18,"show_pv":176624},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6953480711932379143","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，以前看过的，书荒了，现在从温一遍！"},"cont
